name: South Slavey

ancestors.notes: Descent per Glottolog classification of South Slavey (sout2959).

notes: Skeleton. Northern Athabaskan (Dene) language of the Northwest Territories in its practical Roman orthography. Lateral affricates and fricative (tł, tł', ł=[ɬ]), the affricate series ts/ts'/dz and ch/ch'/j, and ejectives written with a following apostrophe are mapped, along with gh=[ɣ] and th=[θ]. Lexical tone (high/low) and vowel nasalization, which this orthography marks inconsistently or not at all, are left unencoded, giving a substantial PER floor.

sources.author: Hammarström, H. et al. (Glottolog 5.0)
sources.title: Glottolog: South Slavey (sout2959)
sources.publisher: Max Planck Institute for Evolutionary Anthropology
